title: senecio litorosus
intro: Senecio litorosus, also known as the Coastal Ragwort, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to provide relief from coughs and congestion, as well as to reduce fever and promote wound healing. Additionally, Senecio litorosus has been used to treat digestive issues and to support the immune system, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies.
